name: win64c-api-set-aware-dynamic-resolver-core

tooling_added.change: Decodes one-byte XCHG r/m,reg and byte XCHG r/m8,reg8, including REX+SIB memory forms used by the resolver cache writes.
Annotates qword image-targets with pointed-to ASCII or UTF-16LE string previews, making pointer tables self-describing.

New exporter recovers static resolver wrapper arguments: selector, API-name pointer/string, R8/R9 dword module-index ranges, module names via a supplied qword table, and direct CALL or tail-JMP transfers.

key_findings.label: api_set_aware_dynamic_import_resolver
key_findings.finding: Entry arguments are ECX=selector, RDX=ANSI API name, R8=start of dword module-index list, R9=end of dword module-index list. The function first decodes proc_cache[selector] at 0x140C56C50 using cookie 0x140C361A8; decoded -1 is a negative-cache sentinel, decoded nonzero is returned immediately.

key_findings.label: module_candidate_loop
key_findings.finding: For each dword module index, the resolver checks module_handle_cache[index] at 0x140C56BA0. Empty entries load module_name_table[index] via LoadLibraryExW(name, 0, 0x800). ERROR_MOD_NOT_FOUND (0x57) on api-ms-/ext-ms-prefixed names triggers prefix validation and a second LoadLibraryExW(name, 0, 0) fallback.

key_findings.label: module_handle_cache_writes
key_findings.finding: The resolver writes module-handle cache entries with XCHG [imagebase + index*8 + 0xC56BA0], RAX, so cache updates are atomic and races can release duplicate LoadLibraryExW handles with FreeLibrary.

key_findings.label: proc_cache_resolution
key_findings.finding: Successful GetProcAddress(module, api_name) results are encoded with the same cookie rotation/XOR scheme and stored via XCHG [imagebase + selector*8 + 0xC56C50], RDX. Failure records the encoded -1 sentinel in proc_cache[selector].

key_findings.label: utf16_prefix_compare
key_findings.finding: Leaf helper compares up to R8 UTF-16 code units from RCX and RDX and returns the first post-prefix difference. Resolver calls pass length 7, derived from ERROR_MOD_NOT_FOUND 0x57 minus 0x50, to test api-ms- and ext-ms- prefixes.

qword_virtual_cache_warnings: 0x140C56BA0 and 0x140C56C50 are virtual-only .data cache arrays in the file image, so static qword reads intentionally record their addresses but cannot read initialized values.

next_work: Use pe-resolver-invocations on neighboring resolver cores/call targets to map the remaining delayed imports outside the NLS/bootstrap set.
Map the wrappers that consume selectors 0x17, 0x18, 0x19, 0x1A, and 0x1E to connect WinRT/AppPolicy/SystemFunction036 paths to higher-level bootstrap behavior.
Continue from resolved NLS APIs back into JS5/login bootstrap consumers now that locale and critical-section dynamic imports are concrete.
